title: AI vaults on Hyperliquid with @neuravaults
summary_title: AI agents optimize stablecoin yield 41% above lending markets on Hyperliquid
summary_description: Neuro Vaults launched today: deposit USDT, agents rebalance across Hyperlend, Hyperfi, Felix to maximize APY. No leverage, no liquidation risk.

key_moments.label: Mainnet launch timing: UAE event + Breakpoint conference same day
Hamza background: Head of DeFi at Polygon, dropped NYU Masters for crypto post-FTX
Why vaults over directional AI trading: agents are probabilistic, not deterministic
User flow: deposit USDT on Neuro Vaults, agents handle allocation, 15-20 min withdrawal window
41% outperformance: agents optimize for size-adjusted yield across three lending protocols
ERC-7540 share token design enables composability, future borrowing against aiUSDT
Roadmap: transparency dashboard showing AI reasoning, new stablecoins (USDe, USDH), yield expansion
Future factory model: let community build custom vaults with agent infrastructure

pull_quote: Yield you cannot go wrong with yield. If it is coming from something like a lending market, you really can't go wrong because there's demand and there's supply.
